allow_insert.description: Analyst INSERT -- requires a MANAGER's just-in-time sign-off

allow_update.description: Analyst UPDATE/MERGE -- requires a MANAGER's just-in-time sign-off

allow_delete.description: Analyst DELETE -- requires an ADMIN's just-in-time sign-off (higher bar than writes)

attestations: allow_insert::{ params.query MATCHES '*INSERT INTO*' OR params.query MATCHES '*insert into*' OR params.query MATCHES '*INSERT OVERWRITE*' OR params.query MATCHES '*insert overwrite*' OR params.query MATCHES '*COPY INTO*' OR params.query MATCHES '*copy into*' }
allow_update::{ params.query MATCHES '*UPDATE *' OR params.query MATCHES '*update *' OR params.query MATCHES '*MERGE INTO*' OR params.query MATCHES '*merge into*' }
allow_delete::{ params.query MATCHES '*DELETE *' OR params.query MATCHES '*delete *' }
description: aditya -- role: analyst. SELECT free; INSERT/UPDATE -> manager attestation; DELETE -> admin attestation; DDL/destructive hard-denied.
